name: 11ai-llm-costs
description: Project-scoped and machine-wide LLM usage and cost reporting across local coding harnesses.

interface.shortDescription: Project and machine-wide LLM cost reports.
interface.longDescription: Analyze local Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cline, Roo Code, OpenCode, and exported usage. Generate project-scoped or machine-wide reports with totals, aggregates, pricing coverage, and per-thread detail.
defaultPrompt: Analyze LLM costs for this project.
Create a machine-wide LLM cost report.
Show LLM token totals and cost aggregates.
